source_meta.source_document: VariAx 2 Distal Radius and Distal Ulna

systems.system_notes: Distal radius and distal ulna plating family within the Stryker VariAx trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker tray layout card identifies a dedicated wrist tray for distal radius fixation workflow.

components.component_notes: Official Stryker materials describe the distal radius plate family within the VariAx 2 system.
Official operative technique materials describe locking fixation options used with the VariAx distal radius construct.
Official operative technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation and drill guide workflow for distal radius plating.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources identify the plate family, wrist tray, and fixation workflow but do not expose a full product-code matrix in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or ordering guide pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
